positive: A magnificent celestial stag centered in the composition, rendered in a stylized silhouette and intricate line art. The stag is framed by a mystical, bioluminescent forest glowing with geometric patterns and constellations. Incorporate highly detailed Art Nouveau motifs and delicate botanical elements (e.g., glowing ferns, moon flowers) around the antlers and the periphery. The style must emphasize extreme high contrast, clean black ink against an aged parchment background, giving the appearance of sophisticated metallic gold foil printing. Ideal print artwork suitable for apparel, full silhouette, vibrant, central composition, detailed etching, Studio macro photography, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, poorly rendered, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, signature, messy, ugly, grain, low contrast, photorealism, logos, trademarks, copyrights
